Good morning!

content.body: Morning! Do the instructions posted here https://github.com/tc39/Reflector/issues/578#issuecomment-4472555858 also apply for today's TG4 meeting? I remember that the TG4 meeting will be in a different room.
Let me confirm with Dmitry Makhnev, but if I remember correctly breakfast is in the same place
content.formatted_body: Let me confirm with @dmitrymakhnev:matrix.org, but if I remember correctly breakfast is in the same place

content.body: I'll be there in about 30 min

Good morning 🌞
Yes. The breakfast at the same place, before the meeting room.
You can find instructions: "Getting up to the meting room getting" https://github.com/tc39/Reflector/issues/578#issuecomment-4472555858
Hi Good morning. I just arrived at the building, but I think I need help from someone to register me in
@room Starting in 12 minutes! For those attending remotely, I'll share the Google Meet URL in a second
Google Meet URL posted at https://github.com/tc39/Reflector/issues/578#issuecomment-4475642326
The various slides are linked in https://github.com/tc39/ecma426/issues/248#issuecomment-4422086852
Here's the example that I showed in the workshop: https://github.com/hbenl/tc39-scope-mapping-examples
Time?
* @nicolo: Time?
The README links to the VSCode extension with scopemap support, the example I showed is in the terser-compress-twice folder
I'm working on range mappings remapping now
https://source.chromium.org/chromium/chromium/src/+/main:third_party/devtools-frontend/src/front_end/models/breakpoints/BreakpointManager.ts;l=998;drc=a0f96f45d931f3fc57126fad5d8050ea63bd2d25
I think we should also collect total/average size of the sourcemaps and loading time

WASM debugging:
https://github.com/bytecodealliance/rfcs/blob/main/accepted/wasmtime-debugging.md
https://github.com/bytecodealliance/rfcs/blob/main/accepted/wasmtime-debugging-v2.md
https://github.com/bytecodealliance/rfcs/blob/main/accepted/wasmtime-debugging-v3.md

* I think we should also collect total/average size of the sourcemaps and loading time

P.S. I'm kindly asking you to not to share this information as it for internal usages only
